description: Rank marker genes per group with sc.tl.rank_genes_groups, write a combined CSV of top markers, per-group CSVs, and standard marker plots (rank panel, heatmap, dotplot).
rules: EXPLORATORY cluster markers only — per-cell tests inflate significance because cells are not independent; for rigorous DE between conditions use the pseudobulk perk + pydeseq2
read-only input — writes markers.h5ad, per-group CSVs (markers/ dir), and plots under record_store
USE_RAW ranks on adata.raw (normalized log values) when present
GROUPBY must be an existing obs column (default leiden)
usage: Set INPUT. Optional: GROUPBY (default leiden), METHOD (wilcoxon|t-test|t-test_overestim_var|logreg), N_GENES, TOP, USE_RAW=1, NO_PLOTS=1. Outputs: markers.h5ad + markers/ CSVs.
limitation: Requires scanpy installed; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder markers.h5ad and still passes.
